summary: The source permits at most forty queue-method calls with capacity at most thirty, so per-call complexity is verified through bounded synchronization semantics rather than noisy thread-dominated scaling.

workload_bound.source_constraint: capacity is at most 30 and each test makes at most 40 queue-method calls

replacement_checks.evidence: Each completed operation uses constant semaphore, mutex, and deque work after scheduler waiting.
Authored cases exercise producer-first, consumer-first, full-queue, empty-queue, and multiple-producer schedules.
The queue validator checks FIFO results or the permitted producer-order multiset plus final size.
The isolated concurrency subprocess terminates blocked or deadlocked implementations with a hard timeout.
